message:
fix(checkpoint): handle errors gracefully in listing and verification

- getAgentCheckpoints: Skip corrupted checkpoints instead of failing
  entirely when one checkpoint has decompression errors
- verifyCheckpoint: Catch getCheckpoint errors and return valid=false
  with descriptive error message instead of throwing

These changes improve resilience when checkpoint data is corrupted,
allowing operations like listing to continue while still properly
reporting the corruption.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
